title: OCX Receipt Schema
description: Schema for OCX component receipts stored at .ocx/receipt.jsonc. Receipts are advisory records of installed components.

version.description: The version of the receipt format

installed.description: Map of installed components keyed by namespace/component

registry.description: The name of the registry this component was installed from

version.description: The version of the component installed

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the actual file content for integrity verification. For multi-file components, this is a deterministic hash of the file bundle.

files.description: Array of project-relative paths where the component files were installed

installedAt.description: The timestamp when the component was installed (ISO format)
